pass_summaries.summary: All four packet findings were resolved. The training-scene concealment now survives through a concrete summary-versus-audit workflow and Tomas's prior altitude symptom match, while the quarters scene renders Margot's dependency through bodily comedown, compulsive behavior, and flat self-justification.
